_comment: Owner Action Queue — the single most important list. Only what needs the OWNER right now. Ordered by priority (high first). priority: high | medium | low. kind: confirm | configure | review | merge | test | decide | provide. Use honest 'if still open / if still active' wording for conditional items.

items.title: Review the GrowVerse Vercel-readiness report and approve the next safe step
items.action: AUDIT DONE + BUILD VERIFIED. Decide: (1) approve a no-secret Vercel preview of growpod/web (Root Dir = growpod/web, npm install, next build), and (2) approve an additive gated /review/plant-review route in the GrowVerse repo so the canonical GrowChamber board can be previewed without exposing /dev/* (it 404s in prod). No secrets/wallet needed. Any GrowVerse code change needs a session with write access to that repo.
items.blocks: A protected Vercel preview of the plant review board

items.title: Configure Cloudflare Access for /lab/* before sharing links widely
items.where: Cloudflare Zero Trust → Access → Applications → Self-hosted
items.action: The control room (Mission Control + AI Command Center) is now real — protect it. Add your-domain/lab + /lab/* to an Access app, Allow policy = your email(s), One-time PIN. See docs/PRIVATE_TESTING_GATE.md. Verify in incognito (Access screen should appear before the page).

items.title: Browser-check /lab/mission-control on the PR #25 preview
items.where: Branch preview: /lab/mission-control/ (and /lab/ for the Mission Control card)
items.action: When you're home: open the dashboard, confirm it renders, Owner Action Queue is on top, all 7 sections populate, theme toggle + copy buttons work, mobile is usable, console is clean. This is the only remaining gate I cannot do (no browser in my environment).

items.title: If the browser check passes, approve / merge PR #25
items.action: Owner-only. No auto-merge. Merge only after the browser gate passes and you're satisfied with scope.
items.blocks: Resuming any new lanes (owner froze new work until Mission Control v1 lands)

items.title: Confirm the correct frontier-al folder/repo before Aether Wing Phase 1
items.action: Tell the next agent exactly where Aether Wing should be built. No Frontier / Aether Wing gameplay starts until this is confirmed.
items.blocks: FRONTIER: Aether Wing Phase 1, frontier-al scaffold

items.title: Browser-check GrowVerse /dev/plant-review before merging that lane — if PR #27 is still open
items.where: GrowVerse repo · /dev/plant-review · PR #27 (cross-repo — reported, not verifiable from devbiz)
items.action: If PR #27 is still open: do the visual review at /dev/plant-review and check CI, then decide merge/hold. Status here is reported / needs verification.

items.title: Verify Cloudflare Access is live for /lab/*
items.where: Manual / external — Cloudflare Zero Trust (not configured in this repo)
items.action: Open /lab/mission-control/ in an incognito/private browser window. EXPECTED: a Cloudflare Access screen appears before the page loads — if so, sign in with the allowed owner email + one-time PIN. IF the dashboard loads with NO prompt: Access is NOT configured yet — do not share the link publicly; configure Cloudflare Zero Trust Access for /lab and /lab/* (see docs/PRIVATE_TESTING_GATE.md). Note: there is no Mission Control password, no app-level login, and no basic-auth in the repo — Access lives in Cloudflare Zero Trust, not in committed code.
items.blocks: Safe sharing of any deployed /lab link

items.title: Configure Cloudflare Access for /lab/* (now also covers /lab/mission-control)
items.where: Cloudflare Zero Trust → Access → Applications → Self-hosted
items.action: Add your-domain/lab and /lab/* to an Access app with an Allow policy = your email(s). Until then, /lab and /lab/mission-control are reachable by URL in production. See docs/PRIVATE_TESTING_GATE.md.
items.blocks: Safe sharing of any deployed /lab link

items.title: Provide the exact Fly CLI path — only if the Fly diagnostic is still active
items.action: If the Fly/Flyctl diagnostic lane is still relevant, give the exact flyctl path so it can resume read-only. If it's no longer relevant, say so and the agent row can be retired.

items.title: Decide on the three open Devbiz draft PRs
items.where: KudbeeZero/devbiz · PR #6 (AI concierge), #20 (Code Lens spec), #14 (ledger reconcile)
items.action: Each is a draft awaiting an owner decision (merge, hold, or close). None are blocking Mission Control.
